overall.description: First-person gameplay footage walking through a cyberpunk market district with Asian-inspired architecture, red lanterns, neon signage, and scattered pedestrians. The scene transitions from covered market alleys to an open street under an overpass, featuring a mix of traditional and futuristic elements typical of Night City from Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow market entry alley with graffiti walls and neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow alley into covered market area, passing plastic seating and food stalls

entered.detail: large cyan neon arrow pointing right on black wall
black wall with white 'DIE DIE DIE' graffiti text
white plastic chairs and tables arranged outside food stalls
traditional red paper lanterns hanging in strings overhead
wooden counter with stools and neon menu signage

segments.scene_description: The video opens in a narrow alley with striking cyan neon signage and graffiti walls. The camera moves forward into a covered market area adorned with traditional red lanterns hanging overhead, passing outdoor plastic seating and food stall counters on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian market with overhead walkways and tall buildings

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at skyscrapers and overhead pedestrian bridges

agents.ego_description: walking through market while looking up at the towering architecture and overhead structures

entered.detail: tall modern glass building with reflective windows rising above the market
elevated pedestrian bridge connecting buildings above the street
dense network of overhead wires and cables crisscrossing between buildings

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the market district, the camera pans upward to reveal towering glass skyscrapers and elevated walkways above the traditional market stalls. The dense network of utility cables crisscrosses overhead while red lanterns continue to line the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: market plaza with large illuminated signage and seating areas

events.description: approaching large 'CAN'T BREATHE' neon sign hanging over the market street

agents.ego_description: navigating through the market plaza passing concrete benches and approaching the large overhead signage

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark suit walking ahead through the market

entered.detail: large illuminated sign with text 'CAN'T BREATHE' suspended over the street
theater entrance with bright neon signage and red awning
long concrete benches with people sitting and resting

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a more open market plaza featuring concrete bench seating and a prominent 'CAN'T BREATHE' neon sign suspended overhead. Pedestrians navigate the space while the architecture mixes traditional market stalls with theatrical marquee signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding market corridor with vendor kiosks and vending machines

events.description: turning right through narrow market passage past purple vending machines

agents.ego_description: navigating turns through narrow market corridors with purple vending machines and security kiosks

entered.detail: bright purple automated vending machines with glowing displays
small blue security kiosk with yellow warning signage
noodle shop with traditional wooden counter and hanging menu

segments.scene_description: The path narrows into a winding corridor lined with distinctive purple vending machines and blue security booths. The camera turns through the tight passage, passing a ramen stall as the market area becomes more enclosed and artificially lit.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk under elevated highway with vehicle traffic

events.description: exiting covered market into open street with concrete overpass and vehicle traffic
moving from shadow of overpass into direct morning sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking along sidewalk next to roadway under the overpass, moving from shadow into sunlight

notable_agents.action: cars driving on the street under the concrete overpass

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass with red neon strip lighting underneath
tall green painted industrial building with barred windows
street sign reading 'Cartwright' suspended over the intersection
asphalt street with moving vehicle traffic and lane markings

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the covered market into an open urban street beneath a massive concrete overpass. The scene shifts from artificial lighting to bright morning sun as the camera walks along the sidewalk next to a green industrial building, with cars visible on the roadway and a 'Cartwright' street sign overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a dense, neon-lit cyberpunk market that eventually opens into a bright, industrial urban street. It begins in a narrow alley defined by cyan signage and graffiti, moving forward under a canopy of traditional red lanterns and past outdoor food stalls. As the camera pushes deeper into the district, the view pans upward to reveal a contrast between the low-lying stalls and towering glass skyscrapers connected by a web of overhead utility cables. The scene then expands into an open plaza featuring concrete seating and bold neon slogans before winding through a tight corridor of purple vending machines and blue security booths. Finally, the camera exits the enclosed market and emerges beneath a massive concrete overpass, where the artificial glow shifts to bright morning sunlight along a sidewalk beside a green industrial building.
